## 当前价位可入手预筛

今日机械预筛没有足够高置信度的“当前价位可入手”标的。正式自动化应宁缺毋滥，不要硬凑 5 支。

## 数据源限制

- Quotes: Futu OpenD session-aware market snapshot first when connected; Nasdaq/Yahoo public quote fields are fallback/enrichment only.
- Chart data: Futu OpenD daily K-line first when connected; Nasdaq historical endpoint is fallback only.
- Financial statements and recent filings: SEC EDGAR companyfacts/submissions where available.
- Mechanical scores are only a pre-screen; the Codex Public Equity Investing pass must verify sources and entry prices.
- 仅供投研辅助，不是投资建议或交易指令。

---

> 公开脱敏版：已移除账户金额、现金、股数、成本、本地路径、API Key 与持仓明细。仅供投研记录，不构成投资建议。
